RURAL DEVELOPMENT AND PANCHAYAT RAJ DEPARTMENT
RESERVATION OF OFFICES OF CHAIRPERSONS OF PANCHAYAT UNION COUNCILS FOR THE PERSONS
BELONGING TO SCHEDULED CASTES / SCHEDULED TRIBES AND FOR WOMEN UNDER THE TAMIL
NADU PANCHAYAT ACT
[G.O. Ms. No. 56, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1) 8th September 2011
ÝõE 22, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´ 2042.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/396(e-1)/2011.
Under Section 57 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayat Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994) the Governor of Tamil
Nadu hereby reserves the offices of the Chairpersons of Panchayat Union Council for the persons belonging to
Scheduled Castes / Scheduled Tribs and for Women as indicated below:
The Chairpersons of the Panchayat Union Councils.
DTP—II-2 Ex. (316)—1

TAMIL NADU GOVERNMENT GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY


RESERVATION OF OFFICES OF CHAIRPERSONS OF DISTRICT PANCHAYAT FOR THE PERSONS BELONGING TO
SCHEDULED CASTES / SCHEDULED TRIBES AND FOR WOMEN UNDER THE TAMIL NADU PANCHAYAT ACT
[G.O. Ms. No. 57, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1) 8th September 2011
ÝõE 22, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´ 2042.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/396(e-2)/2011.
Under Section 57 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayat Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994) the Governor of Tamil Nadu hereby
reserves the offices of the Chairpersons of District Panchayat  for the persons belonging to Scheduled Castes / Scheduled Tribs
and for Women as indicated below:
The Chairpersons of District Panchayats.

TAMIL  NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE  EXTRAORDINARY                    8
RESERVATION OF SEATS OF WARDS OF DISTRICT PANCHAYAT
[G.O. Ms. No. 58, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1) 8th September 2011
ÝõE 22, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´ 2042.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/396(e-3)/2011.
Under Section 27, 28 and 32 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayat Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994) the Governor of Tamil Nadu
hereby reserves the seates for the persons belonging to Scheduled Castes / Scheduled Tribes and for Women in the District
Panchayat Wards as indicated below:
The District Panchayat Wards.
Fixation of Strength/division of wards and Reservation of seats for scheduled caste/scheduled tribes and
women in the  wards of District Panchayat in Tamil Nadu State.

RESERVATION OF SEATS OF WARDS OF PANCHAYAT UNION COUNCIL
[G.O. Ms. No. 59, Rural Development and Panchayat Raj (PR-1) 8th September 2011
ÝõE 22, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´ 2042.]
No. II(2)/RDPR/396(e-4)/2011.
Under Section 20 of the Tamil Nadu Panchayat Act, 1994 (Tamil Nadu Act 21 of 1994) the Governor of Tamil
Nadu hereby reserves the seats for the persons belonging to Scheduled Castes / Scheduled Tribes and for Women
in the Wards of Panchayats Union Councils as indicated below:
The Wards of Panchayat Union Councils.
